title: leptophyllochloa micrathera
intro_study: According to "Photodermatology, photoimmunology & photomedicine", leptophyllochloa micrathera (presumably referring to Polypodium leucotomos as there is no reference to leptophyllochloa micrathera in the study) benefits include providing photoprotective effects, increasing the UV dose required for immediate pigment darkening, minimal erythema dose, and minimal phototoxic dose, and protecting Langherhans cells.
